ModMetadata.Name: Stationeers Methane Combustion Fix
ModMetadata.Author: yaskovdev
ModMetadata.Description:
This mod is a BepInEx plugin. [b]It requires BepInEx with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin to be installed.[/b] See the detailed guide at: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
[h1]Stationeers Methane Combustion Fix[/h1]
Fixes incorrect methane combustion reactions to be chemically accurate.
[b]Notes:[/b] [list] [*] Works with existing saves. The mod does not modify save files, so it can be safely enabled or disabled at any time. [*] Avoids the issue of leftover methane in the welder. [*] Tested with the Gas Fuel Generator (GFG). Combustion reaches the expected 90% ratio. [/list]
[h2]Methane + Oxygen[/h2]
Replaces the incorrect reaction: 2 CH4 + O2 -> 6 CO2 + 3 POL
With the correct reaction: CH4 + 2 O2 -> CO2 + 2 H2O
Recommended fuel mixture: 33% methane, 67% oxygen.
Always enabled.
[h2]Methane + Ozone[/h2]
Replaces the incorrect reaction: 3 CH4 + 2 O3 -> 6 CO2 + 3 POL + H2O
With the correct reaction: 3 CH4 + 4 O3 -> 3 CO2 + 6 H2O
Recommended fuel mixture: 42% methane, 58% ozone.
[b]Disabled by default.[/b] Enable in the StationeersLaunchPad configuration window or in BepInEx/config/StationeersCombustionFix.cfg (BepInEx is located in the game folder, e.g. C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Stationeers).
[h2]Feedback[/h2]
Contributions, improvements, suggestions, and comments are welcome.
GitHub repository: https://github.com/yaskovdev/StationeersCombustionFix
